name: OCTAVE SPECIALTY GROUP INC
business: Octave Specialty Group, Inc. is a financial services holding company operating two principal businesses: Insurance Distribution, which includes managing general agents and underwriters (MGA/Us), an insurance broker, and other distribution and underwriting businesses; and Specialty Property & Casualty Insurance, which operates five insurance carriers under the Everspan brand that provide specialty program business. The company sells insurance underwriting, distribution, and related services to commercial and personal lines customers, including niche specialty risks, accident & health, specialty auto, professional lines, and other specialty classes.
sellsTo: C-suite executives and other key talent
licensed architects, engineers, construction managers and real estate professionals
employers for stop loss and limited benefit medical

exposures.sentence: Octave operates two principal businesses: Insurance Distribution Octave's specialty property and casualty ("P&C") insurance underwriting and distribution business, includes Managing General Agents and Underwriters (collectively "MGAs" or "MGA/Us"); an insurance broker; and other distribution, underwriting and related businesses.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. P&C insurance market is estimated at $1 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: We operate within the estimated $1 trillion U.S. P&C insurance market with a particular focus on the commercial MGA/U program market, both on an Admitted and Excess & Surplus Lines ("E&S") basis.

tamClaims.claim: The E&S market generated just under $130 billion of direct written premium in 2024, a 12.3% increase over the prior year.
tamClaims.sentence: According to data from AM Best, the E&S market generated just under $130 billion of direct written premium in 2024, an increase of 12.3% over the prior year and represents 12.3% of the industry direct premium volume.

tamClaims.claim: The E&S market nearly doubled from $66 billion in 2019 to $130 billion in 2024, a 14.5% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: The E&S market has nearly doubled from $66 billion in 2019 to $130 billion in 2024, a 14.5% compound annual growth rate compared to 8.3% for the overall P&C industry.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. MGA/U market exceeded $110 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated by Conning, Inc. ("Conning") that the U.S. MGA/Us market exceeded $110 billion in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: The MGA/U sector had $92 billion in statutorily reported direct premium written in 2024, a 15% increase over the prior year.
tamClaims.sentence: According to data from Conning, the MGA/U sector is one of fastest growing segments of the U.S. P&C insurance market with 2024 statutorily reported direct premium written of $92 billion, an increase of 15% over the prior year.
